verdict: Highly repetitive and copy-pasted stream patterns that ignore physical flow, creating awkward continuous spins/crossovers inappropriate for a Medium chart.

issues.problem: Repeating L-R-U-D pattern for 17 seconds creates continuous 8th-note spins/crossovers, which is extremely exhausting and inappropriate for a Medium difficulty chart.
Extreme repetition of the exact same 'Jump LR -> U -> D -> L' sequence for nearly 40 seconds, making the gameplay feel very lazy and monotonous.
Repetitive 'D-U-L-R' stream doesn't follow any melodic variation and feels heavily copy-pasted.
